# Preface {.unnumbered}

This book teaches you to build games for the [Playdate](https://play.date) —
Panic's pocket-sized console with a 400x240 1-bit screen, a d-pad, two buttons,
and a crank — using the Lua SDK.

Every example in this book is a real, runnable Playdate project you can build
and play. Every screenshot was captured automatically from the very example it
illustrates, by the test harness you will meet in Chapter 18. The patterns come
from sixty shipped Playdate games.

*(Full preface to come.)*
